'''madotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xnipek|xnipek]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xnipek|xnipek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| madotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædetheth|mædetheth]] || [[word:mædethej|mædethej]] || [[word:mædethesh|mædethesh]] || [[word:mædethe|mædethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madodothoth|madodothoth]] || [[word:madodothoj|madodothoj]] || [[word:madodothosh|madodothosh]] || [[word:madodotho|madodotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madothoth|madothoth]] || [[word:madothoj|madothoj]] || [[word:madothosh|madothosh]] || [[word:madotho|madotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madofthoth|madofthoth]] || [[word:madofthoj|madofthoj]] || [[word:madofthosh|madofthosh]] || [[word:madofthof|madofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madothotho|madothotho]] || [[word:madothojo|madothojo]] || [[word:madothosho|madothosho]] || [[word:madothoko|madothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madothoth|madothoth]] || [[word:madothoj|madothoj]] || [[word:madothosh|madothosh]] || [[word:madotho|madotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madothothol|madothothol]] || [[word:madothojol|madothojol]] || [[word:madothoshol|madothoshol]] || [[word:madothokol|madothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madothothotho|madothothotho]] || [[word:madothojojo|madothojojo]] || [[word:madothoshosho|madothoshosho]] || [[word:madothoko|madothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madothothon|madothothon]] || [[word:madothojon|madothojon]] || [[word:madothoshon|madothoshon]] || [[word:madothokon|madothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madothothoro|madothothoro]] || [[word:madothojoro|madothojoro]] || [[word:madothoshoro|madothoshoro]] || [[word:madothokoro|madothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
